★★★★★

Curtis is hands down the best barber in Grandview. My son has been going to him for 2 years and every cut is perfect. Wouldn't go anywhere else.

Always on point. Fade is clean every single time. Been coming here for years and Curtis never misses. Walk-ins are easy too.

Meet Curtis

Owner
Curtis Redick
Master Barber · Owner

The face behind Flatliners. Known for precision fades, creative designs, and making every client feel like a VIP. His work speaks for itself — 4.9 stars and 206 reviews don't happen by accident.

After Hours & Holiday Policy
Sundays and holidays are by call-in appointment only. All after-hours and holiday cuts are $50 flat — non-negotiable.
